name: The Survivor
description: The harsh realities of hirearchical dominion and economic disparity have worn down survivors. They adapt, overcome, and do whatever is necessary to survive.
startingBonus: Roll on the Citizen Starting Equipment chart for an extra piece of gear.
gameplayEffect: Receive a Luck Token when acting in a way that exemplifies resilience and adaptability.

name: The Vile
description: Vile characters have embraced darker aspects such as ambition and greed. They might manipulate, betray, or take advantage of others by any means necessary.
gameplayEffect: Receive a Luck Token when acting in self-interest or engaging in morally dubious actions.

name: The Virtuous
description: Virtuous characters are guided by time-honored virtues such as courage, justice, and loyalty. They strive to act for the greater good, even in the face of personal sacrifice.
startingBonus: 1d3 trusted contacts. These can be defined before or during gameplay and will always assist your character if they are able to do so.
gameplayEffect: Receive a Luck Token when engaging in actions that uphold their principles.
